name: the hexagonal melt pattern
identity: An unnatural, geometric anomaly in the frozen landscape, marked by a perfect hexagonal melt pattern and crystalline growths. Its presence suggests a subtle magical influence that distorts the environment, causing vegetation to wither and air to feel thinner.
current_status: Being meticulously mapped by the player using non-invasive observation techniques, with a focus on documenting the site's reactive properties and influence patterns.

appearance.value: hexagonal melt pattern, crystalline growths, dark fragments embedded in snow

role.value: Part of an interconnected natural system with observable, reactive properties

environmental_effects.value: thin air, withered vegetation, unnatural cold

volatile_state.location: frozen landscape near the distant glowing peaks
volatile_state.current_activity: being mapped by the player using non-contact observation techniques to study its reactive properties and influence patterns

notes: No open questions or ambiguities identified.
